title: @dzhng: The headless CRM for your agent
rawContent:
Tweet by @dzhng (David)
Author bio: founder @duetchat • prev: @socialpluscorp @nasajpl
Text: [link to X article]
Article title: The headless CRM for your agent
Created: 2026-04-06T17:44:04.000Z
Metrics: {retweet_count: 16, reply_count: 18, like_count: 262, quote_count: 7, bookmark_count: 601, impression_count: 25763}

Linked project: github.com/dzhng/crm.cli
Repo description: An open-source, headless CRM built for agents. No UI. No dashboard. Just a CLI and a FUSE-mounted filesystem.
Repo stats: 66 stars, 2 forks, TypeScript, MIT license, created 2026-04-03
Topics: agent, ai-agents, claude, claude-code, codex, codex-cli, crm, openclaw

Project details:
- Headless CRM: no server, no Docker, no GUI. Single SQLite file.
- CLI-first: `npm install -g @dzhng/crm.cli` or `bun install -g @dzhng/crm`
- FUSE filesystem mount: `crm mount ~/crm` exposes CRM data as virtual files readable by any tool
- Commands: contact add/list/show/edit/merge, company add/list, deal add/list
- Data normalization: E.164 phone, LinkedIn URL extraction, fuzzy duplicate detection
- Unix-friendly: JSON output, pipeable to jq/grep/awk
- Config: crm.toml with cascading resolution, pipeline stages, hooks
- Storage: single SQLite DB (~/.crm/crm.db), no external dependencies
- AI agent integration: ships with skills/ folder for Claude Code context
- Multi-reference lookup: find contacts by ID, email, phone, or social handle (LinkedIn, X, Bluesky, Telegram)
